title: Section 13
content: For the purposes of sections 128, 130 and 131 of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898 (5 of 1898), all officers, non-commissioned officers and other enrolled persons who have been attached to a unit shall be deemed to be officers, non-commissioned officers and soldiers for respectively of 1[the Regular Army].
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "regular forces".
